title: aubrieta columnae subsp. italica
intro: Aubrieta columnae subsp. italica, also known as Italian rockcress, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Italy. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Italian rockcress include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help manage blood sugar levels. Italian rockcress can be prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, with some reports also suggesting that it can be used in traditional medicine as a poultice or applied directly to the skin.
